activated_rules.rule_name: EU origin normalization with multiple EU countries allowed in invoice

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' with address in Sweden is explicitly found in invoice headers and address blocks. Land matches Sweden exactly after normalization. Normalizations of company suffix and capitalization applied. No conflicting names found (4.1.0, 4.1.3.6, 4.1.4).

consignee.certificate_value: Brusarosco de Mexico S.A de C.Vv
consignee.invoice_value: Brusarosco de Mexico S.A. de C.V. ( 17500040 )
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Brusarosco de Mexico S.A de C.Vv' from certificate matches invoice buyer and ship-to fields 'Brusarosco de Mexico S.A. de C.V.'. Land is Mexico and matches. Minor variations in spacing and punctuation normalized. Verified against invoice 'Payer' and 'Ship-to' (4.2.0, 4.2.2.1, 4.2.3).

goods_description.motivation: Goods description 'Provence Jet Black' in certificate matches invoice lines with description 'PROVENCE 600R JET BLACK I - 99203'. Article number 'SEG-26D-465794' also matches certificate reference. Allowed normalization for case and spacing applied. Invoice description is more specific but includes the certificate product description.

quantity.certificate_value: 1266 kgs (Gross Weight), 1126 kgs (Net Weight), 1397,61 M2, 2 Pallets
quantity.invoice_value: Gross weight 1266 kgs, Net weight 1126 kgs, Total M2: 1397,61 M2, 2 Pallets
quantity.motivation: Certificate quantities of gross weight (1266 kgs), net weight (1126 kgs), area (1397.61 m2) and packaging (2 Pallets) all explicitly appear in invoice with exact numeric and unit matches. Allowed normalization of decimal notation applied. All relevant certificate quantities verified per rule (4.4.3, 4.4.4).

origin.invoice_value: GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN, Swedish Origin
origin.motivation: Certificate origin includes 'European Union' and 'Sweden'. Invoice states 'GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN' and 'Swedish Origin' explicitly. EU normalization applied allowing interchange between EU and Sweden. Origins verified explicitly in clear origin phrases (4.5.4.1, 4.5.4.2).

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer exakt mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter i certifikatet och fakturan stämmer överens utan avvikelse. Consignor, consignee, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland verifieras exakt. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
